pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh EVIDENCE_DIR and export_result.sh EVIDENCE_DIR variables
Confirmed via export_result.sh pdf_targets array and verifier.py explicit checks
Confirmed via export_result.sh log file substring checks and verifier browser history logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires visiting three real-world Tor project URLs (check.torproject.org, torproject.org/about/history, and metrics.torproject.org) and saving them as PDFs (evidence_01_tor_check.pdf, evidence_02_tor_history.pdf, evidence_03_tor_metrics.pdf) in the /home/ga/Documents/CaseEvidence/ directory. All URLs, target directories, and expected PDF filenames were successfully verified against the setup and evaluation scripts.
